title: Payment period
content:
The payment period in respect of which an end of year payment is 
payable under this Part shall be—
	
(a)	
the payment period specified in that behalf in the 
contract of employment; or
	
(b)	
if a payment period is not so specified, a lunar year.

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
